visual_language: Analogue broadcast console — static-field entry screen, frequency dials, waveform readouts, phosphor-green CRT glow, aviation-red warning accents, midnight sky background, and steel/CRT-glass panels for resolved transmissions. Symbolic objects: tuning dial, signal bar, waveform strip, frequency label.
encounter: Visitor lands on a static interference field — fragments of artwork ghost through the noise. Each collection is a broadcast frequency on a console row. Clicking a flickering signal clears the static and resolves the full collection below. The interface rewards patient tuning over instant summary.
intent: Living archive broadcast — every frequency / collection coexists; deep tuners surface older and newer work equally. No hierarchy by recency.

components.description: Compact broadcast header: tower callsign / portfolio name + signal strength bar
A console row per collection: dial graphic, frequency label (collection name), signal indicator, click to intercept
Collapsed by default — animated static texture with ghosted artwork fragments bleeding through. Click triggers resolve.
Fully resolved transmission: artwork grid appears with clear paper mat tiles after intercept.
Paper-matted artwork tile within resolved band
